tasks.label: archive-sync-specs-contact-aware
archive-sync-2026-04-27-brittle-platform-occupied-break
args: cd 'c:\Endava\EndevLocal\Personal\web_game_openspec'; npx openspec sync-specs --change '2026-04-27-brittle-platform-occupied-break' --apply; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { Write-Output 'Sync OK' } else { Write-Output 'Sync failed'; exit 1 }

tasks.label: archive-manual-sync-brittle-ready-break-timer
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; cd 'c:\Endava\EndevLocal\Personal\web_game_openspec'; $deltaPath='openspec/changes/2026-04-27-brittle-ready-break-timer/specs/platform-variation/spec.md'; $mainPath='openspec/specs/platform-variation/spec.md'; $delta=Get-Content -Raw -Path $deltaPath; $main=Get-Content -Raw -Path $mainPath; $marker='### Requirement: Unstable platforms create timing pressure'; $next='### Requirement:'; $deltaStart=$delta.IndexOf($marker); if($deltaStart -lt 0){ throw 'Delta requirement marker not found.' }; $newSection=$delta.Substring($deltaStart).TrimEnd(); $mainStart=$main.IndexOf($marker); if($mainStart -lt 0){ throw 'Main requirement marker not found.' }; $searchFrom=$mainStart + $marker.Length; $mainNext=$main.IndexOf($next,$searchFrom); if($mainNext -lt 0){ throw 'Next requirement marker not found in main spec.' }; $prefix=$main.Substring(0,$mainStart); $suffix=$main.Substring($mainNext); $updated=($prefix + $newSection + "`r`n`r`n" + $suffix).TrimEnd(); Set-Content -Path $mainPath -Value $updated; Write-Output 'Manual spec sync complete: platform-variation unstable-platform requirement updated.'"

tasks.label: archive-manual-sync-brittle-ready-break-timer-retry
tasks.command: cd 'c:\Endava\EndevLocal\Personal\web_game_openspec'; $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $deltaPath='openspec/changes/2026-04-27-brittle-ready-break-timer/specs/platform-variation/spec.md'; $mainPath='openspec/specs/platform-variation/spec.md'; $delta=Get-Content -Raw -Path $deltaPath; $main=Get-Content -Raw -Path $mainPath; $marker='### Requirement: Unstable platforms create timing pressure'; $next='### Requirement:'; $deltaStart=$delta.IndexOf($marker); if($deltaStart -lt 0){ throw 'Delta requirement marker not found.' }; $newSection=$delta.Substring($deltaStart).TrimEnd(); $mainStart=$main.IndexOf($marker); if($mainStart -lt 0){ throw 'Main requirement marker not found.' }; $searchFrom=$mainStart + $marker.Length; $mainNext=$main.IndexOf($next,$searchFrom); if($mainNext -lt 0){ throw 'Next requirement marker not found in main spec.' }; $prefix=$main.Substring(0,$mainStart); $suffix=$main.Substring($mainNext); $sep=[Environment]::NewLine + [Environment]::NewLine; $updated=($prefix + $newSection + $sep + $suffix).TrimEnd(); Set-Content -Path $mainPath -Value $updated; Write-Output 'Manual spec sync complete: platform-variation unstable-platform requirement updated.'

tasks.label: archive-move-brittle-ready-break-timer
tasks.command: cd 'c:\Endava\EndevLocal\Personal\web_game_openspec'; $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $src='openspec/changes/2026-04-27-brittle-ready-break-timer'; $dst='openspec/changes/archive/2026-04-27-brittle-ready-break-timer'; if (-not (Test-Path 'openspec/changes/archive')) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'openspec/changes/archive' | Out-Null }; if (-not (Test-Path $src)) { throw "Source change folder missing: $src" }; if (Test-Path $dst) { throw "Archive target already exists: $dst" }; Move-Item -Path $src -Destination $dst; Write-Output "Archive move complete: $dst"
